basic_details.job_title: DCPU Munger Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager, Ayah Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Munger (DCPU Munger)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Munger (DCPU Munger) Manager/Coordinator, Ayah Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Munger Manager/Coordinator, Ayah Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Manager/Coordinator and Ayah.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Social Work/ Sociology/ Psychology/child development/Human Rights Public Administration/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health from a recognized University & Diploma in Computer Application, 8th Pass
qualification.details: Manager/ Coordinator: Graduate in Social Work/ Sociology/ Psychology/child development/Human Rights Public Administration/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health from a recognized University & Diploma in Computer Application. Ayah: 8th Pass.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Munger Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.district_child_protection_unit_munger_dc: Graduate in Social Work/ Sociology/ Psychology/child development/Human Rights Public Administration/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health from a recognized University & Diploma in Computer Application, 8th Pass

content_sections.heading: DCPU Munger Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCPU Munger Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DCPU Munger Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Munger Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manager/ Coordinator: Graduate in Social Work/ Sociology/ Psychology/child development/Human Rights Public Administration/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health from a recognized University & Diploma in Computer Application. Ayah: 8th Pass.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Munger Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Munger recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DCPU Munger recruitment is 06th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Manager/Coordinator and Ayah posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by DCPU Munger. One vacancy is for the Manager/Coordinator post and another for the Ayah post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager/Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Manager/Coordinator position, candidates must be graduates in fields like Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, Human Rights, Public Administration, Psychiatry, Law, or Public Health, along with a Diploma in Computer Application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification for the Ayah post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Ayah post is passing the 8th standard from a recognized board or institution.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the Manager/Coordinator post is Rs. 23,170/- per month, and for the Ayah post, it is Rs. 7,944/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment drive by DCPU Munger.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for DCPU Munger jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Munger recruitment includes the preparation of a Merit List, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for DCPU Munger recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Munger?
faq.answer: The official website of the District Child Protection Unit Munger is https://munger.nic.in/. You can visit this site for more information and updates.
